Address
201 E THOMPSON ST, DECATUR, TX 76234

Setting
Urban
1 /5
★★★★★
CMS Overall Rating

CMS 5-Star Ratings

CMS rates every Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing home on four domains. The Overall rating is driven primarily by Health Inspection results, then adjusted up or down by Staffing and Quality Measures.

Overall Rating
Composite of Health Inspection, Staffing, and Quality Measures.
★★★★★ 1/5
Health Inspection
Based on the three most recent standard surveys, with more weight on recent results.
★★★★★ 1/5
Staffing
Weighted combination of RN and total nurse staffing hours per resident per day, case-mix adjusted.
★★★★★ 1/5
Quality Measures
15 resident-level quality measures split between long-stay and short-stay (post-acute) residents.
★★★★★ 4/5
Quality Measures breakdown
Long-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 5/5
Short-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 2/5

Staffing & Workforce

Direct-care staffing is the strongest operational driver of quality in nursing homes. Values are hours per resident per day, derived from payroll-based journal (PBJ) submissions. "Case-mix" adjusts for resident acuity; "Adjusted" is the CMS rating-input value.

Role Reported Case-mix expected Adjusted Federal floor
Total nurse
All nursing staff combined: RN + LPN + Aide
 2.63 3.36 3.03 ≥ 3.48 Below floor
Registered Nurse (RN)
Licensed RN hours. Strongest driver of clinical outcomes.
 0.32 0.59 0.37 ≥ 0.55 Below floor
Licensed Practical Nurse (LPN)
LPN/LVN hours. Often handles medication administration.
 0.98 0.75 1.13 —
Nurse aide
CNA hours. Bulk of direct resident care — bathing, feeding, mobility.
 1.33 2.03 1.53 —
Licensed (RN + LPN)
Combined licensed nurse coverage.
 1.30 — — —
Physical therapist
Rehabilitation therapist hours — important for post-acute / rehab admissions.
 0.03 — — —

Federal minimums (phasing in under the CMS 2024 minimum staffing rule) shown for reference. RN: 0.55 hrs/resident/day. Total nurse: 3.48 hrs/resident/day.

Weekend staffing

Total nurse (weekend)
2.43
hrs / resident / day
RN (weekend)
0.29
hrs / resident / day
Total nurse (adjusted, weekend)
2.79
hrs / resident / day

Weekend under-staffing is a common quality-of-care concern — adverse events are more frequent when licensed coverage drops.

Staff turnover

Total nursing staff turnover
48.9%
annual
RN turnover
42.9%
annual
Administrators departed
2
last 12 months

Resident acuity

Nursing Case-Mix Index
1.19
higher acuity than avg
Case-Mix Index Ratio
0.86
facility / state ratio

Health Inspections

CMS weights three inspection cycles to compute the Health Inspection rating: the most recent (50%), the second most recent (33%), and the oldest (17%). Each standard-survey deficiency is assigned a score based on scope and severity; complaint-survey findings and revisit scores are added to produce the cycle total.

Cycle Date Total defs. Standard Complaint Deficiency score Revisits Total score
Cycle 1 (most recent) 2024-11-20 9 4 6 398 1 398
Cycle 2/3 (prior) 2023-09-28 7 4 4 48 1 48
Total weighted health score
310.5
lower is better
Infection-control citations
0
last cycle

Deficiencies (19)

Individual survey findings. Scope/severity uses the CMS A–L matrix: letters further down the alphabet indicate greater harm and wider scope, up through J–L (immediate jeopardy).

15 D/E/F Actual harm — potential for minor
4 J/K/L Immediate jeopardy
Tag Description Scope/Severity Survey date Corrected
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. E 2025-07-17 2025-07-24
0689 Ensure that a nursing home area is free from accident hazards and provides adequate supervision to prevent accidents. K 2025-04-30 2025-04-07
0656 Develop and implement a complete care plan that meets all the resident's needs, with timetables and actions that can be measured. K 2025-03-14 2025-03-15
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. K 2025-03-14 2025-03-15
0760 Ensure that residents are free from significant medication errors. K 2025-03-14 2025-03-15
0580 Immediately tell the resident, the resident's doctor, and a family member of situations (injury/decline/room, etc.) that affect the resident. D 2025-02-19 2025-02-20
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. D 2024-11-20 2024-11-22
0698 Provide safe, appropriate dialysis care/services for a resident who requires such services. D 2024-11-20 2024-11-22
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. E 2024-11-20 2024-11-22
0761 Ensure drugs and biologicals used in the facility are labeled in accordance with currently accepted professional principles; and all drugs and biologicals must be stored in locked compartments, separately locked, compartments for controlled drugs. D 2024-11-20 2024-11-22
0657 Develop the complete care plan within 7 days of the comprehensive assessment; and prepared, reviewed, and revised by a team of health professionals. E 2023-09-28 2023-09-29
0693 Ensure that feeding tubes are not used unless there is a medical reason and the resident agrees; and provide appropriate care for a resident with a feeding tube. D 2023-09-28 2023-09-29
0695 Provide safe and appropriate respiratory care for a resident when needed. D 2023-09-28 2023-09-29
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. E 2023-09-28 2023-09-29
0839 Employ staff that are licensed, certified, or registered in accordance with state laws. F 2023-05-25 2023-05-26
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. D 2023-05-25 2023-05-26
0693 Ensure that feeding tubes are not used unless there is a medical reason and the resident agrees; and provide appropriate care for a resident with a feeding tube. D 2022-07-19 2022-07-20
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. E 2022-07-19 2022-07-20
0914 Provide bedrooms that don't allow residents to see each other when privacy is needed. E 2022-07-19 2022-08-31
